_comment: Realistic example rows for each table. Use these to understand the actual shape of payloads — especially the nested objects on RWA.xyz signals and the markdown text on Telegram signals. All ids are fake but the structure matches production.

signals_defillama.notes: Top tokenized treasury fund up 5% intraday on $150M+ inflow. Strong signal.

signals_rwa_xyz.notes: Sustained AUM growth on top-3 tokenized treasury asset. Noted but not headline-worthy.

payload.text:
**General Tensor Acquires Backprop Finance to Expand Bittensor Infrastructure**

• The deal gives General Tensor control over one of Bittensor's largest decentralized trading platforms for subnet tokens.

• Backprop Finance specializes in Dynamic TAO (dTAO) subnet trading.

• The acquisition follows General Tensor's $5M fundraise backed by Digital Currency Group.

[Source](https://techbullion.com/general-tensor-expands-beyond-validators-with-backprop-finance-acquisition/)

signals_telegram_newswire.notes: Niche Bittensor M&A. Outside core RWA beat; pass.

stories_defillama_derived.headline: BlackRock BUIDL: 24h TVL move +5.29%
stories_defillama_derived.narrative_angle: rwa protocol tvl shift; assess size, direction, and magnitude vs peers

stories_telegram_derived.headline: Kraken Replaces LayerZero with Chainlink for Cross-Chain Bridge
stories_telegram_derived.narrative_angle: newsfeed item — write an analyst take that adds context, mechanism, or contrast

key_data_points.label: Headline
key_data_points.value: Kraken Replaces LayerZero with Chainlink for Cross-Chain Bridge

key_data_points.label: Full message
key_data_points.value:
**Kraken Replaces LayerZero with Chainlink for Cross-Chain Bridge**

• Migration follows $292M LayerZero bridge exploit at Kelp in April...

drafts_single.body: BUIDL added $150M in a single day, taking @BlackRock's tokenized treasury fund to $2.99B TVL. The +5.29% intraday move came on flat 7d numbers (+1.05%), meaning this was concentrated — one allocator, not a steady accumulation. @DefiLlama tracking confirms.

drafts_thread.body:
BUIDL just crossed $2.99B in TVL.

The +5.29% single-day move means roughly $150M of new inflows in 24 hours. That's not retail rebalancing.

@BlackRock's tokenized treasury fund is now multi-chain and absorbing capital at a pace most DeFi protocols would kill for. 7d change is only +1.05%, so most of this is a concentrated burst.

$150M in a day into a tokenized MMF tells you someone large either allocated fresh capital or migrated from a competing product. Either way, BUIDL is becoming the default parking lot.

The question worth asking, per @DefiLlama: at $3B, does BUIDL start pulling liquidity from other onchain treasury products, or does it grow the whole category?
body_json: The +5.29% single-day move means roughly $150M of new inflows in 24 hours. That's not retail rebalancing.
@BlackRock's tokenized treasury fund is now multi-chain and absorbing capital at a pace most DeFi protocols would kill for. 7d change is only +1.05%, so most of this is a concentrated burst.
$150M in a day into a tokenized MMF tells you someone large either allocated fresh capital or migrated from a competing product. Either way, BUIDL is becoming the default parking lot.
The question worth asking, per @DefiLlama: at $3B, does BUIDL start pulling liquidity from other onchain treasury products, or does it grow the whole category?

posts.body: Tokenized treasury TVL crossed $31B this week, +200% YoY. @DefiLlama's tracker hit a new high yesterday on @BlackRock BUIDL flows alone.
